input.question: Show me my equity portfolio with holdings, daily P&L, sector allocation and YTD performance
input.original_question: Show me my equity portfolio with holdings, daily P&L, sector allocation and YTD performance

data.enhanced_question: Show me my equity portfolio with holdings, daily P&L, sector allocation, and YTD performance. Please provide a detailed table of holdings including ticker symbols, number of shares, current market price, and total market value. Calculate daily profit and loss in both absolute dollars and percentage terms based on the previous close. Generate a sector allocation breakdown showing specific percentage values for each sector. Additionally, provide year-to-date performance metrics, including the total return percentage and the portfolio value at the start of the year compared to the current value.

data_requirements.requirement: Detailed rows for each holding with ticker symbol, quantity, current price, and total market value.
Total portfolio current value, previous day value, daily change amount, and daily change percentage.
Sector names and corresponding portfolio allocation percentages.
Portfolio value at the start of the year, current value, and calculated year-to-date return percentage.

metadata.enhancement_summary: Added specific requirements for holding details (ticker, quantity, price), precise P&L calculations (value and percentage), sector percentage breakdowns, and YTD performance basis (start of year vs current).
metadata.original_question: Show me my equity portfolio with holdings, daily P&L, sector allocation and YTD performance
